description: Top-level operational categories for Torq Central. These categories are organized by operating function, not by file type.

categories.name: Vision
categories.description: Foundational strategy, positioning doctrine, company vision, ICP, values, and operating principles.

categories.name: Voice
categories.description: Tone calibration, founder transcripts, lexical rules, and voice examples.

categories.name: Clients
categories.description: Client profiles, briefs, active project context, and delivery records.

categories.name: Market Intelligence
categories.description: Research dossiers, competitor maps, voice of customer, and category signals.

categories.name: Offers
categories.description: Offer architecture, pricing logic, risk reversal, and commercial packages.

categories.name: Storytelling
categories.description: Narrative frameworks, pitch structures, presentations, and founder story assets.

categories.name: Copy
categories.description: Approved copy assets, VSL logic, scripts, headlines, and campaign copy.

categories.name: Content Planning
categories.description: Editorial calendars, content series, CTA maps, repurposing plans, and Canva production briefs.

categories.name: Publishing
categories.description: Approval logs, queue items, scheduling metadata, distribution jobs, and measurement loops.

categories.name: Cases
categories.description: Proof libraries, before-and-after narratives, measured outcomes, and reusable learnings.
